}

exercises.code:
# skeptic S39-T2-B-E1 packet-only
record = {
    "case_id": "CASO-LIM-039-T2B",
    "score": 0.9,
    "threshold": 0.7,
    "human_action": "skip",
}
auto = "queue" if record["score"] >= record["threshold"] else "skip"
final = auto
override = False
meets = final == "skip" and override is False
status = "PASS" if meets else "REJECT_OVERRIDE"
print("S39-T2-B", status)
